name: codex-polymarket
description: polymarket research and guarded trading workflows for codex. use when codex needs to analyze polymarket markets, perform deep market research, review positions and open orders, draft trade strategies, create order tickets, or connect to a polymarket mcp server for live market data and manual execution.

interface.shortDescription: analyze markets and draft guarded trades
interface.longDescription: analyze polymarket markets, monitor watchlists, review portfolio risk, draft execution plans, and connect to a guarded polymarket mcp server for market data and manual trading.
defaultPrompt: Use Polymarket to analyze this market and write a market memo.
Use Polymarket to review my positions and open orders.
Use Polymarket to draft an order ticket for a guarded limit order.
